task: take the chicken off the grill
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A robotic arm is positioned over a grill with a black body and a metal grate. A yellow chicken is on the grate. The grill is on a wooden surface. The chicken is a rigid object with a textured surface. STRATEGY - First, reach and grasp the chicken on the grill. Then, transport it to a safe area (the wooden surface below the grill). Finally, place the chicken on the wooden surface. Failure modes include dropping the chicken during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach the chicken on the grill. Step 2: Grasp the chicken's body for a secure hold. Step 3: Transport the chicken to the wooden surface. Step 4: Place the chicken on the wooden surface.**
Goal: on(chicken, wooden_surface); stable(chicken)
Scene: chicken, grill, wooden_surface
Step 1: reach(chicken)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow chicken
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, chicken, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, chicken) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(chicken)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow chicken
  contact: holding(chicken) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(chicken)
Step 3: transport(chicken -> wooden_surface)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the wooden surface
  spatial: above(chicken, wooden_surface, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(chicken)
  done_when: above(chicken, wooden_surface, 0.05)
Step 4: place(chicken -> wooden_surface)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the wooden surface
  contact: surface_contact(chicken, wooden_surface) [completion]; released(chicken) [completion]
  pose: stable(chicken) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(chicken, wooden_surface) AND released(chicken)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the yellow chicken
the body of the yellow chicken
an empty area on the wooden surface
an empty area on the wooden surface
